//: Project MCP servers. Never commit secrets — use env vars. Optional: set CONTEXT7_API_KEY in your shell for higher Context7 rate limits (free key at context7.com/dashboard).

context7.//: Up-to-date docs for GSAP / TanStack Router / Tailwind v4 / shadcn while coding.

chrome-devtools.//: Official Google. Performance traces, Lighthouse-style insights, screenshots, console/network — used by /qa-audit for the Lighthouse >= 90 gate.

shadcn.//: Official shadcn registry MCP — browse/search/install components; pairs with /add-shadcn.
